robots.name: BitTorrent Chunk Distribution
robots.description: Visualize how BitTorrent splits files into chunks and distributes them across a swarm using rarest-first strategy

robots.name: Distributed Hash Table
robots.description: Kademlia-style DHT with XOR routing, k-buckets, node join/leave, and hop-by-hop lookup visualization

robots.name: Gossip Protocol Simulator
robots.description: Watch information spread through a network via gossip, compare flooding vs gossip vs tree broadcast

robots.name: CRDT Collaborative Editor
robots.description: Three simulated users editing via CRDTs with configurable delay and packet loss, conflict visualization

robots.name: NAT Traversal & Hole Punching
robots.description: Step-by-step animation of STUN discovery, hole punching, and TURN relay fallback across NAT types

robots.name: WebRTC P2P Chat
robots.description: Actual working peer-to-peer chat via WebRTC DataChannel with clipboard-based signaling

robots.name: WebRTC Video Call
robots.description: Peer-to-peer video calling with camera, microphone, and screen share via clipboard signaling

robots.name: P2P File Sharing
robots.description: Send any file directly browser-to-browser via WebRTC DataChannel, zero server involvement

robots.name: Collaborative P2P Whiteboard
robots.description: Draw together in real-time over WebRTC with brush, shapes, colors, and per-user undo

robots.name: P2P Collaborative Text Editor
robots.description: CRDT-based code editor synced over WebRTC with remote cursors and syntax highlighting
